title: Chinese Roasted Australian Lamb
description: A flavorful and aromatic Chinese-inspired roasted lamb dish featuring Australian lamb. This recipe yields a tender and deliciously seasoned lamb that's perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Australian lamb leg (2 kg)
ingredients.notes: Bone-in or boneless, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a good-quality soy sauce for the best flavor

instructions: Trim any excess fat from the lamb leg, if needed.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, grated ginger, soy sauce, five-spice powder, brown sugar, and rice vinegar.
Rub the lamb leg all over with the spice mixture, making sure to coat it evenly.
Drizzle the olive oil over the lamb and season with black pepper.
Place the lamb leg in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
Roast the lamb for 20 minutes per kilogram, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Baste the lamb with the pan juices every 20-30 minutes to keep it moist and promote even browning.
Once the lamb is cooked to your liking, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the roasted lamb with your choice of sides, such as steamed vegetables or stir-fried noodles.
